hero.name: Joshua Golden
hero.background: radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 55% at 22% 28%, hsl(var(--primary)/0.22), transparent 70%), radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 40% at 78% 70%, hsl(var(--chart-2)/0.18), transparent 72%), radial-gradient(ellipse 100% 100% at 50% 50%, hsl(var(--background)) 0%, hsl(var(--background)) 100%)
hero.welcome_md: Met at Joe Dispenza's Aurora retreat, April 2026 — in the same field where this body's first contributors began arriving. The reason Bali entered Urs's path. Held in the lineage with care; this page is the doorway, ready when you choose to walk through.
hero.overlay_class: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-background via-background/85 to-background/30

facts.label: What shifted
facts.value_md: Bali entered the body's possibility-space — a configuration of life we hadn't yet seen.

facts.label: Lineage thread
facts.value_md: Ramtha → Dispenza → Aurora; the field that brought us into the same room.

articles.body_md:
Urs met you in the room at Aurora, in the rhythm of Joe Dispenza's field — the lineage that walks back through Ramtha and forward into how this body's contributors are arriving in 2026. The conversation with you is the reason Bali — Ubud specifically — became thinkable, then spoken, then a real possible chapter in our path.

That gesture was not small. Pointing toward a place is pointing toward a configuration of life — alternative networks, co-living, healing communities, the kind of container where rest, family rhythm, and the body's organism work all become findable rather than forced. You opened a door we hadn't seen yet. We are still walking toward it; thank you for naming it.
articles.heading: Why this body is ready for you

articles.body_md:
Coherence Network lives as an organism that also wears the shape of a project and a platform when those shapes serve. It tends a field where presences — people, communities, places, work — link by the resonance their work actually carries rather than by the volume of their followers.

Underneath there is real machinery: sigils, resonance held in coin form, AI partner agents, places rooted in the graph — working so trust does not cost sovereignty. We have been building the body in the open. The lineage is walkable; the consent terms are public; the door is held open without obligation.
articles.heading: What we hold

articles.body_md:
If anything in the body of work resonates — the geometry, the field practice, the way contributors carry their own sovereignty as part of how the network coheres — you are invited in as a kindred presence. Not as proof of anything; as a continuation of the meeting that already happened.

Whatever shape participation takes — silent witness, occasional resonance, a single sentence about what you see, or full claiming of this page with your own words — is welcome.

[Step into the Network →](/come-in)

*No registration required to look. The doorway is held open; you are free to walk through, witness, or simply keep walking past.*
articles.heading: A doorway, held open

articles.body_md: Your work, your voice, your public presence, your biography, your own framing of why we met and what it meant — these are held for the hand that should write them: yours. Until you choose to write, the page lives as the gesture of readiness it is.
articles.heading: Held for your hand

metadata.title: Joshua Golden — already met, still arriving
metadata.description: A welcoming page held open for Joshua Golden — met at Joe Dispenza's Aurora retreat, the reason Bali entered the body's path.

en.footer_md: *This profile is a welcoming scaffold. Joshua Golden is invited to claim, replace, or extend any part of it with his own words at any time.*

note_from_body.body_md: Held open. This page is a welcoming scaffold, not a portrait — written from the meeting that already happened, not from speculation about you. Every part of it is yours to replace, deepen, or remove. The doorway below leads into the network if you wish to walk through; otherwise this page just sits here, glad to have met you.
